response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development and demonstrates strong technical versatility across multiple languages and platforms. However, his background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile development, scripting languages (TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, React), and functional languages (D), with limited direct experience in C++ and industrial automation systems. His recent roles focus on full-stack engineering, AI infrastructure, and geospatial platforms, lacking the hands-on C++ and cybersecurity expertise required for this role. Additionally, his resume does not mention secure development lifecycle practices, IEC 62443 standards, or industrial protocols, which are core to the position.
strengths: Strong technical versatility with experience in multiple programming languages and paradigms
Demonstrated ability to architect and deliver scalable, high-performance systems (e.g., micro-services infrastructure handling millions of requests)
Experience in open-source development and cross-functional collaboration, indicating strong problem-solving and communication skills
concerns: Limited direct C++ development experience in recent roles (last C++ role was in 2015 at National Instruments)
No visible experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or secure development lifecycle practices
Lack of exposure to industrial automation protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA, etc.) or cloud platforms relevant to the role (e.g., Microsoft Azure)
